name: login_1
text:
You opened this mod.
It shows that you are a true warrior.

name: login_2
text:
But the game ends here.
I shall play Rock-Paper-Scissors with you **personally**.

name: click
text: What are you going to throw?

name: win_1
text:
Do you think you have become powerful?
**Heh, you're wrong.**

name: win_2
text:
It's just that I'm not in my best form today.
I'm leaving. Come back and play again if you have the guts.

name: lose
text: To you, I am like a god—invincible.

name: none
text: How dare you run away in the middle of a battle!

name: ping
text: I'll let you off this time. Next time we meet, I'll duel you formally. You'd better surrender.
